message:
ci(release): Add publish-crates job for crates.io

Adds automatic crates.io publishing after GitHub release:

- Runs on stable releases only (skips pre-releases via '-' check)
- Uses CARGO_REGISTRY_TOKEN from secrets
- Publishes with --all-features --locked

This enables `cargo install coding-agent-search` after releases.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -179,6 +179,24 @@ jobs:
     outputs:
       version: ${{ steps.version.outputs.version }}
 
+  publish-crates:
+    name: Publish to crates.io
+    needs: release
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    timeout-minutes: 15
+    if: ${{ !contains(github.ref, '-') }}
+    env:
+      CARGO_REGISTRY_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.CARGO_REGISTRY_TOKEN }}
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+
+      - name: Install Rust nightly
+        uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@nightly
+
+      - name: Publish to crates.io
+        if: ${{ env.CARGO_REGISTRY_TOKEN != '' }}
+        run: cargo publish --all-features --locked
+
   # ==========================================================================
   # Notify Package Managers to Update
   # ==========================================================================
